name: Varicose Veins on a Leaf
recipeIngredient: 15 1/2 oz French-style green beans, liquid included
recipeInstructions: Heat the beans in their liquid according to the directions on the can. Wash and dry the lettuce and arrange the leaves on a serving platter. Pour the beans and liquid into a glass bowl. Add red food coloring, drop by drop, until the liquid turns the color of blood. Place the bowl in the refrigerator for 15 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, remove the beans and place them in a vein-like pattern on top of the leaves. Sprinkle almonds over the beans for added crunch and flavor.
